title: ambrosia aspera
intro: Ambrosia aspera, also known as sand-bur or sand-bur marigold, is a perennial plant native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Ambrosia aspera include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its use as a treatment for skin conditions and wounds. The herbal preparations of Ambrosia aspera include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and roots in hot water or oil.
